name: Datadog
one_line: Cloud-scale monitoring, observability, and security analytics platform.
self_serve_detail: Free-tier account (no card) via signup; generate API key (DD-API-KEY) and Application key (DD-APPLICATION-KEY) in Organization Settings > API Keys / Application Keys. Both headers sent per request.
api_surface: REST broad (v1/v2, metrics, logs, monitors, dashboards, incidents, security)

name: Sentry
one_line: Error tracking, crash reporting, and application performance monitoring for developers.
self_serve_detail: Free-tier account via signup; create a personal/org auth token (Sentry-Bearer) at Settings > User > API Auth Tokens or via internal integration. OAuth2 app also self-serve for third-party apps.
api_surface: REST broad (issues, events, projects, orgs, releases)

name: Notion
one_line: All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, databases, and project wikis.
self_serve_detail: Free account; create a personal access token (ntn_*) at notion.so/developers/tokens or an internal integration token at notion.so/profile/integrations. OAuth for public apps. Business/Enterprise may restrict PAT creation by policy.
api_surface: REST broad (pages, databases, blocks, users, comments, search)

name: Linear
one_line: Fast issue tracking and project management tool for software teams.
self_serve_detail: Free plan includes API access; generate a personal API key (lin_api_*) at Settings > Account > Security & Access, or create an OAuth2 app at Settings > API > Applications for user-delegated access.
api_surface: GraphQL (single broad graph; issues, projects, teams, comments)

name: Jira
one_line: Atlassian's issue tracking and agile project management platform.
self_serve_detail: Free Atlassian Cloud tier; create an API token (Basic auth: email + token) at id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens. OAuth 2.0 (3LO / client credentials) self-serve via developer.atlassian.com. MCP API-token auth needs an org admin to enable the Rovo MCP setting; OAuth path is self-serve.
api_surface: REST broad (Cloud REST v3, JQL, Agile, Service Management)
